title: Homalolepis tocantina
taxonomy: Homalolepis tocantina is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to South America. The classification of Homalolepis tocantina is as follows: it is classified in the kingdom Plantae, in the clade Angiosperms, in the clade Eudicots, in the clade Asterids, and in the family Asteraceae, in the subfamily Heliantoideae, in the tribe Heliantheae, in the subtribe Eutaxiinae, in the genus Homalolepis. The genus Homalolepis is closely related to the genus Eutaxia. More research is needed to fully understand the taxonomy of Homalolepis tocantina.
